# inlined `(?N IS NULL OR b.space_id = ?N)` guard fragment.
# Generated by: python3 scripts/check-space-filter-drift.py --update-baseline
# The check-space-filter-drift prek hook fails when a file's count DROPS BELOW
# its baseline (a canonical guard was removed / degraded to a bare `b.space_id = ?`),
# or when any guarded fragment has mismatched bind indices.
